mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_notification_delivery( tenant_id, org_id, event_id, event_type, subscription_id, channel_id, status, attempts, next_retry_at, last_error, http_status, payload_snapshot, rendered_title, rendered_body, is_delete, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{subscriptionId}, #{channelId}, #{status}, #{attempts}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError}, #{httpStatus}, #{payloadSnapshot}, #{renderedTitle}, #{renderedBody}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_notification_delivery WHERE is_delete = 0 AND status = 'failed' AND attempts < #{maxAttempts} AND next_retry_at IS NOT NULL AND next_retry_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY next_retry_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_notification_delivery SET status = #{status}, attempts = #{attempts}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, http_status = #{httpStatus}, payload_snapshot = #{payloadSnapshot}, rendered_title = #{renderedTitle}, rendered_body = #{renderedBody}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
